\tzpentry{ID3654}{Connection Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3654 introduces Connection Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{A}(r,t) = 1 + \int_0^t \frac{8\pi G}{c^4} T_{\text{spiral}}(r,\tau) e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{gal}}} d\tau \end{equation}
